name: py-observability
description: Observability patterns for Python backends. Use when adding logging, metrics, tracing, or debugging production issues.
capabilities: Implement structured logging with context and request IDs
Set up Prometheus metrics with counters, histograms, and gauges
Configure Sentry error tracking with sensitive data redaction
Create flow tracing for multi-step operations
Build health check endpoints for dependency verification
Add proper error logging with full context and exception details
author: CJHarmath
securitySummary: All 45 static findings are false positives. This is a pure documentation skill containing only code examples for observability patterns. No executable code, network calls, filesystem access, or command execution exists. The scanner detected markdown formatting syntax and metadata hashes as security issues.
valueStatement: Production issues are impossible to debug without observability. Silent failures and missing context in errors make incidents last longer. This skill provides patterns for logging, metrics, tracing, and error tracking for Python backends.
limitations: Does not install or configure dependencies
Does not modify existing code files
Does not access production systems or metrics
Does not provide hosting or infrastructure

useCases.title: Add logging to API endpoints
useCases.description: Implement structured logging with request context for FastAPI or Flask backends.

useCases.title: Set up monitoring dashboards
useCases.description: Configure Prometheus metrics and Sentry error tracking for production services.

useCases.title: Debug production incidents
useCases.description: Trace multi-step operations and correlate logs by request ID for faster debugging.

promptTemplates.title: Basic logging setup
promptTemplates.scenario: Add logging to a Python service
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me set up structured logging using structlog for a Python FastAPI service. Include request ID correlation and proper log levels.

promptTemplates.title: Add Prometheus metrics
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me how to add Prometheus metrics to a Python web application. Include HTTP request counters and latency histograms.

promptTemplates.title: Configure error tracking
promptTemplates.prompt: Configure Sentry error tracking for a Python backend. Include sensitive data redaction and custom context for better debugging.

promptTemplates.title: Trace multi-step flows
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement flow tracing for a multi-step business process in Python. Include step-by-step logging and error handling with context.

bestPractices: Always include request_id and user_id in logs for correlation
Use structured key-value pairs instead of string interpolation in logs
Log with full context when errors occur including error type and message
Redact sensitive data before logging request bodies or user information
antiPatterns: Silent early returns without logging why the function returned early
Logging errors without context (just the error message, no user or request info)
Using unstructured string formatting instead of structured key-value logging

faq.question: Which Python frameworks are supported?
faq.answer: Patterns work with FastAPI, Flask, and any Python async or sync framework. Libraries used are framework-agnostic.

faq.question: What logging libraries does this skill use?
faq.answer: Primary library is structlog for structured logging. Can also use standard logging module with custom formatters.

faq.question: Can I use this with Docker or Kubernetes?
faq.answer: Yes. Structured JSON logs work well with container orchestration. Prometheus metrics scrape endpoints easily.

faq.question: Is sensitive data safe in logs?
faq.answer: Skill includes patterns to redact passwords, tokens, and API keys before logging. Always review log output.

faq.question: Why are my logs not appearing?
faq.answer: Check log level configuration, ensure logger is properly initialized, and verify structured log output format matches your log collector.

faq.question: How is this different from other logging skills?
faq.answer: Focuses on production observability with metrics and tracing, not just log formatting. Includes Prometheus and Sentry integration.
